sourceName: Medicine, Healthcare and Life Science CV
resumeLength: One page for internships/jobs; longer academic CV for publications, clinical training, or research output.

formattingRules.fontRecommendation: Readable and formal; keep clinical/research details organized by section.
formattingRules.bulletStyle: Bullets should name protocol, population/sample, method, and output.

writingRules.bulletFormula: Action + clinical/lab/public-health context + method/protocol + population/sample/scope + quality or research output
quantificationRules: Prefer concrete scope: sample size, stakeholder count, case volume, event size, model accuracy, project duration, budget, risk, or response time when supported by source facts.
When exact numbers are absent, use bounded evidence such as tool, method, deliverable, audience, or process scope; never invent metrics.
Use metrics differently by domain: technical performance for engineering, compliance/accuracy for audit, writing/research output for law and policy, service reliability for hospitality.

exampleBullets.strong: Prepared samples and documented protocol deviations during weekly lab assays to support reproducible analysis.
exampleBullets.reason: Shows method, quality control, and research contribution without overstating authority.

exampleBullets.strong: Supported patient intake and wayfinding for outpatient visitors, maintaining accurate records and timely handoffs to staff.
exampleBullets.reason: Converts service work into process, population, and reliability evidence.

scoringCriteria.description: Conventional headings, readable layout, aligned dates, consistent spacing, and parser-friendly text.
Prominent sections and bullets match the target role and market context.
Bullets show action, method, scope, and outcome without unsupported claims.
Specific, concise, role-native language with no inflated AI phrasing.
Structure and density match the selected role, country, and CV/resume style.

promptSnippets.title: Medicine, Healthcare and Life Science CV routing rule
promptSnippets.content: When the target role matches Medicine / Healthcare / Life Science, use Medicine, Healthcare and Life Science CV as the primary industry route and adopt this formula: Action + clinical/lab/public-health context + method/protocol + population/sample/scope + quality or research output.

promptSnippets.title: Medicine, Healthcare and Life Science CV language guardrail
promptSnippets.content: Preserve domain-native evidence for Medicine / Healthcare / Life Science; do not convert the profile into a generic tech, finance, or consulting resume unless the user target explicitly requires it.

sourceReferences.label: Local 123456 CV sample corpus
sourceReferences.note: 56 newly added CV/resume samples from docs/sample-resume-knowledge; abstracted into rules only, without copying resume text.
